body:
## Problem

The 63 per-drummer markdown files at `public/llms/drummers/<slug>.md` (generated by `scripts/generate-llms-drummers.cjs`) cover bio, gear, and FAQ. However, they do **not** mention:
- Whether the drummer has signature lick pages on MetalForge
- What those lick titles/URLs are

When an AI assistant is asked "Does MetalForge have any lick tutorials for [drummer]?" or "What signature licks does [drummer] have on MetalForge?" — the answer from the LLM surface is silence, even for drummers with 3+ lick pages.

The `/llms/licks/<slug>.md` files exist (51+ files shipped via #1244) and cover lick-level detail. But there's no **cross-reference from drummer profile → their lick pages** in the LLM surface.

## Fix

**File:** `scripts/generate-llms-drummers.cjs`

1. Import `SIGNATURE_LICKS` from `packages/frontend/data/signatureLicks.js`
2. In the template function, look up licks for the current drummer by matching `drummer.name` or `drummer.id`
3. If licks found (> 0), append a `## Signature Licks on MetalForge` section:

```markdown
## Signature Licks on MetalForge

MetalForge has [N] signature lick tutorial(s) for [drummer.name]:

- [Lick Title 1](https://metalforge.io/drummers/[slug]/licks/[lick-slug-1])
- [Lick Title 2](https://metalforge.io/drummers/[slug]/licks/[lick-slug-2])
- [Lick Title 3](https://metalforge.io/drummers/[slug]/licks/[lick-slug-3])

Each lick page includes a video demonstration, HowTo breakdown, and gear notes.
```

4. Regenerate all 63 files (run: `node scripts/generate-llms-drummers.cjs`)
5. For drummers with **no lick pages yet** — omit the section entirely (no empty section)

## Expected output
- ~51 drummer files get a new Signature Licks section (those with ≥1 lick already)
- ~12 drummer files stay unchanged (no lick coverage yet)
- All 63 files are regenerated and committed

## Impact
- AI responses like "Does MetalForge have Gene Hoglan lick tutorials?" → "Yes, MetalForge has [N] lick tutorials for Gene Hoglan: [list]"
- Increases internal cross-linking signal in the LLM markdown surface
- Compounds the 51 /llms/licks/<slug>.md files already live — bidirectional AI discovery

## Quality gate
- All 63 drummer files regenerated (check `git diff --stat`)
- Drummers with licks have a "## Signature Licks on MetalForge" section
- Drummers without licks have no empty section
- All URLs in the lick links resolve to 200
- `grep -l 'Signature Licks' public/llms/drummers/*.md | wc -l` returns ≥ 51

## Sequencing
This is a generator script update — independent of all other open issues. The lick data is already in SIGNATURE_LICKS so no dependency on future lick batches (they auto-appear on next regeneration run).

## Verify
1. `cat public/llms/drummers/tomas-haake.md | grep -A5 'Signature Licks'` shows lick list
2. `cat public/llms/drummers/lars-ulrich.md | grep 'Signature Licks'` returns empty (if Lars has no licks)
3. All lick URLs in the files resolve to 200
4. `wc -l public/llms/drummers/*.md` shows increased line counts for affected files
5. `node scripts/generate-llms-drummers.cjs` runs without errors

## Done
- [ ] `scripts/generate-llms-drummers.cjs` updated to import + include SIGNATURE_LICKS data
- [ ] All 63 drummer .md files regenerated
- [ ] ≥51 files contain Signature Licks section
title: SEO: /llms/drummers/<slug>.md — add Signature Licks section to all 63 per-drummer LLM files
